Triggering the system-level deconstruction of engineering and manufacturing confusion and the '20-person electronic weak-current engineering and maintenance construction team' validation probe. The fake Apple global OEM template in the original data has been physically written off. This enterprise, named 'Ningshi Electronic Technology,' although branded with 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and 'Small Enterprise' tags by the official system, and with the tail end of its business license piled high with heavy terms like 'electronic component manufacturing, specialized equipment manufacturing,' had its core feature group astutely captured by the forensic logic engine: it possesses 20 organized employees, yet its paid-in capital is only 176,000 RMB, and its spatial coordinates are located at 'Room 109D, Building 1... Most crucially, its licensed item is 'various engineering construction activities,' and the first half of its general items is extremely honestly filled with 'sales of electrical accessories, electrical equipment repair, computer repair, electromechanical equipment leasing.' The logical deduction instantly stripped away its 'major manufacturing plant' disguise: this is absolutely not a capital-intensive electronic component production plant (170,000 paid-in capital cannot even buy a single SMT line). Leading 20 workers in a 1st-floor storefront/office, they perform typical engineering contracting and technical services. The truth is extremely grounded: this is a 100% pure 20-Employee Weak Current Engineering & IT/Electrical Maintenance Contractor (a physical construction team). They primarily take on network cabling, surveillance installation, electromechanical equipment repair, and the sales of office computer consumables for enterprises and institutions through bidding or freelance jobs.
